title: Falling Sand Workshop
description: A 12-material cellular automaton sandbox — sand, water, fire, lava, ice, oil, plants and more, all reacting in real time.
concept: A full falling-sand simulation with 11 interactive materials and emergent reactions. Pour lava onto ice, watch oil ignite, grow plants near water, or load preset scenes like a volcano eruption or arctic cave. Draw freely, save your creation as a PNG, or share it via URL hash.
features: 11 materials with emergent reactions (fire melts ice, lava hardens to stone, water quenches fire into steam)
Adjustable brush size (1-15) and simulation speed (1-8 steps/frame)
4 preset scenes: Volcano, Ecosystem, Ice Cave, Oil Blaze
PNG screenshot export and URL-hash save/load for pattern sharing
Full keyboard shortcuts and mobile touch support

interaction.mouse: Draw materials by clicking and dragging on the canvas
interaction.click: Material buttons select active element; action buttons control simulation
interaction.touch: Full touch drawing support with pointer events
